description_long: This is a pastel pink and white bunk bed with a whimsical, child-friendly design. The upper bunk is surrounded by safety rails with vertical slats and features a decorative arched headboard and footboard. The lower bunk is wider and also has an arched headboard and footboard, with a patterned comforter featuring playful motifs. A sturdy angled ladder with handrails provides access to the upper bunk, and three pull-out drawers are integrated beneath the lower bed for storage. The frame is constructed with rounded posts and smooth edges, giving it a soft, inviting appearance suitable for a child's room.
description: A pastel pink and white bunk bed with safety rails, an angled ladder, and storage drawers beneath the lower bunk. The design is playful and child-friendly, featuring arched headboards and a patterned comforter.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bunks, the angled ladder, safety rails, and three storage drawers under the lower bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bed, the ladder's profile, and the arched headboard and footboard details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back rails of both bunks and the solid structure of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ladder's attachment and the symmetry of the headboard and footboard arches.
